data.name: EntryOfRequiredInfo
data.value: Entry of required information + Processed Metrics

data.name: EntryOfRequiredInfo_Help
data.value: For proper execution of the analysis, you are required to complete only the cells shaded in gray and in bold.

data.name: RegisteredUnits_Tooltip
data.value: Total number of units (businesses, customers, stalls, permits, etc.) currently in the official register for this revenue stream.

data.name: EstUnregisteredPercent_Tooltip
data.value: Best estimate of how many active units are not on the register. Enter as percentage (e.g., 5 for 5%).

data.name: TotalEstimatedUnits_Tooltip
data.value: Total estimated units = Registered Units x (1 + Est. % Unregistered/100).

data.name: CompliantUnits_Tooltip
data.value: Estimated using proxy formula: Registered x (Revenue to Date / Billed Amount).

data.name: CompliantUnits_Formula
data.value: = Registered x (Revenue to Date / Billed Amount)

data.name: BilledAmount_Tooltip
data.value: Total amount officially charged for collection (billed) for the analysis year.

data.name: OutstandingAmount_Tooltip
data.value: Portion of current year charges that remain unpaid. Should NOT include arrears from previous years.

data.name: RevenueToDate_Tooltip
data.value: Auto-calculated. Total revenue collected = Billed Amount minus Outstanding.

data.name: UsefulAverageValues
data.value: Useful Average Values required for the Analysis

data.name: StatutoryAvgBilled_Tooltip
data.value: The average bill per unit implied by the official fee schedule as written in law, without applying waivers, discounts, or exemptions.

data.name: RealisticImprovementPercent_Tooltip
data.value: The share of the gap between today's average bill and the statutory average that you believe can realistically be closed through policy or administrative reforms (0-100).

data.name: AverageBilledAmount_Tooltip
data.value: Current average bill per registered unit = Billed Amount / Registered Units.

data.name: AchievableAvgBill_Tooltip
data.value: Target average bill achievable through reforms = Avg Billed + (Improvement% x (Statutory - Avg Billed)).

data.name: DeltaA_Tooltip
data.value: Per-unit billing improvement achievable through reforms: Achievable Avg. Bill - Average Billed Amount.

data.name: ComplianceRatio_Tooltip
data.value: Proxy indicator of compliance system performance. Measures proportion of billed amounts actually collected. >80% Green, 60-80% Yellow, <60% Red.

data.name: CoverageRatio_Tooltip
data.value: Proxy indicator of coverage system performance. Measures proportion of total units registered. >80% Green, 60-80% Yellow, <60% Red.

data.name: PotentialRevenueBreakdown
data.value: Potential Revenue Breakdown (Actual Revenue + Adm. Gap breakdown)

data.name: ComplianceGap_Tooltip
data.value: The proportion of registered units that do not pay or fulfill their liability. Reflects weaknesses in enforcement, billing, and payment collection. Equals Outstanding Amount.

data.name: CoverageGap_Tooltip
data.value: Revenue lost from unregistered units. Quantified by multiplying unregistered units by average billed amount.

data.name: LiabilityGap_Tooltip
data.value: Additional revenue achievable from compliant units through improved billing (using achievable average bill vs current average).

data.name: MixedGapCompLiab_Tooltip
data.value: Revenue loss from non-compliant registered units combined with under-billing. Shows compounded effect of enforcement failure and low billing.

data.name: MixedGapCovLiab_Tooltip
data.value: Revenue missed from unregistered units valued at achievable billing levels. Captures full revenue loss from both lack of registry and under-billing.

data.name: PieChartDescription
data.value: This pie chart illustrates the percentage distribution of the total potential revenue from the billing system. It visually shows the share corresponding to the revenue actually collected during the year, as well as the contribution of each type of gap (uncollected or lost revenue) to that total.

data.name: MatrixDescription
data.value: This matrix visualization shows the gap analysis across two dimensions: the number of units (vertical axis from Compliant to Estimated) and the billing level (horizontal axis from average billed to achievable billing). Each colored cell represents a different type of gap or revenue component.

data.name: ComplianceGapAdmin_Tooltip
data.value: The proportion of registered units that do not pay. Reflects weaknesses in enforcement, billing, and payment collection systems.

data.name: CoverageGapAdmin_Tooltip
data.value: The proportion of total estimated units that are not registered. Indicates lack of identification and inclusion in the database.

data.name: LiabilityGapAdmin_Tooltip
data.value: Revenue improvement achievable from compliant units through better billing practices.

data.name: MixedGapCompLiabAdmin_Tooltip
data.value: Revenue loss from non-compliant registered units that are also under-billed.

data.name: MixedGapCovLiabAdmin_Tooltip
data.value: Revenue missed from unregistered units valued at achievable billing levels.

data.name: BreakdownPieChartDescription
data.value: This pie chart illustrates the percentage distribution of the revenue gaps. It visually shows the contribution of each type of gap to the total uncollected revenue, helping to identify which gaps are the most significant.
